descriptionShort: Article comparing the 1990 Surrey Royals to the 1987 Richmond Sockeyes, discussing team budgets and Bruce Taylor's ownership.
descriptionLong: The Vancouver Sun article compares the 1990 Surrey Royals to the 1987 Centennial Cup champion Richmond Sockeyes. Coach John Olver notes the Royals' operating budget is under $140,000 but may reach $200,000-$300,000, while the Royals employ players through Taylor's roofing and sheet metal company rather than paying them directly. An observer notes the Royals spent half a million dollars but weren't as impressive as expected, despite beating another team four straight.

attribution.headline: Royals compared to '87 Sockeyes championship team
